title: sophora prazeri var. mairei
intro: Sophora prazeri var. mairei, also known as the Maire's sophora or Maire's kowhai, is a plant species native to the southwestern part of the Yunnan province in China. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sophora prazeri var. mairei include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations to support its therapeutic uses.
